name: ClientService
description: Implementation of the 'ClientService' model. A service that is on a client's account.

ActiveDate.description: The date that this pricing option became active and could be used to pay for services.

Count.description: The number of service sessions this pricing option contained when first purchased.

Current.description:
When `true`, there are service sessions remaining on the pricing option that can be used pay for the current session.
When `false`, the client cannot use this pricing option to pay for other services.

ExpirationDate.description: The date when the pricing option expires and can no longer be used to pay for services, even if unused service sessions remain on the option; expressed as UTC.

Id.description: The unique ID assigned to this pricing option, specific to when it was purchased by the client.

ProductId.description: The unique ID of this pricing option, not specific to any client's purchase of it.

Name.description: The name of this pricing option.

PaymentDate.description: The date on which the client paid for this pricing option.

Program.description: Contains information about the service category this service falls under.

Remaining.description: The number of service sessions remaining in the pricing option that can still be used.

SiteId.description: The ID of the subscriber site associated with this pricing option.

ClientID.description: The Client ID assigned to this pricing option, specific to when it was purchased by the client.

Returned.description: Identification for purchased service is returned or not.
